programme.desc: Matsuzaka is out on a date with her boyfriend when Shin-chan turns up and interrupts them. As a result, Matsuzaka takes him home.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae plans out a diet she can follow to lose weight. However, her cravings get the better of her and she ends up overeating.

programme.desc: When Misae comes across her old school uniform, she puts it on. However, the principal of the kindergarten notices this and embarrasses her.

programme.title: Shin Chan

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Without apprising his mother Misae, Shin-chan sneaks off to the girls' school attended by the Saitama Crimson Scorpions. Consequently, Misae scolds him.

programme.desc: Whilst preparing to take a bath, Misae instructs Shin-chan to check if the temperature of the water is suitable. However, Shin-chan finds it challenging to do so.

programme.desc: When Hiroshi returns from work, he brings home his coworker's old fax machine. However, Shin-chan faxes his drawings to Hiroshi and a letter to a news station.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Hiroshi and Misae take Shin-chan to visit the zoo but Shin-chan and Hiroshi are more keen on observing beautiful women instead of the zoo animals. Later, Shin-chan plays with a lemur.

programme.desc: Shin-chan shares an energy drink with Hiroshi after he decides to go to sleep early. Consequently, Hiroshi struggles with sleep.

programme.desc: On a rainy day when Hiroshi is at home, Shin-chan pesters him into playing hide and seek with him. However, when Hiroshi searches for Shin-chan, he cannot find him.

programme.desc: Hiroshi plans to train Shin-chan to become a baseball player. However, on the day of training he forgets Shin-chan and takes Shiro with him instead.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: After Shin-chan and his family watch a movie starring Kizakora, Shin-chan wins an opportunity to meet her and spend time with her.

programme.desc: Misae and Shin-chan take a trip to Osaka and board the bullet train to travel. However, they come across the principal of the kindergarten on the way.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae and Hiroshi find fish eggs in the fridge and decide to eat them. However, despite enjoying their meal, they fall sick.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan, Misae and Hiroshi are joined by Shin-chan's grandparents to celebrate the New Year. Consequently, they eat their lunch and spend time together.

programme.desc: When Shin-chan scribbles on a wall, he is caught in the act by a security guard. However, despite her attempts to keep him in her custody, he escapes.

programme.desc: As Misae is about to go out, Shin-chan decides on a code for him and her. Later, when a courier arrives, Shin-chan pesters him and makes him use the code.

programme.desc: Shin-chan and Hiroshi go out on a ski trip during winter. However, they encounter a heavy snow storm which forces them to return home.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah

programme.desc: The residents realise Champaklal's party is a Bhajan Party to thank God for his blessings and for making the paint job successful.
